date_semantics.data_cutoff_date: 可使用数据截止日，必须 <= signal_date
date_semantics.entry_date: 建仓价格日期，必须 >= rebalance_date
date_semantics.exit_date: 退出价格日期，必须 > entry_date

anti_future_data_rules.no_future_data: no future status, future score, future liquidity
anti_future_data_rules.delisted_handling: delisted/missing data must be recorded as warning or excluded by rule
anti_future_data_rules.benchmark_use: uses same entry_date and exit_date window
